economic_notes: Z'Gamok Enterprises LP and Z'Gamok Construction LP engaged in contracted services for mining, ore hauling, snow removal and custodial services. Sagamok Development Corporation and Ritchie Falls Resort (2344827 Ontario Inc.) also consolidated. COVID-19 effects noted.
notes: Health Canada revenue is zero in 2020 (was $2,489,688 in 2019) — likely reclassified under ISC due to government restructuring. Two GBEs (Z'Gamok Enterprises LP and Z'Gamok Construction LP) accounted for on modified equity basis. Two fully consolidated subsidiaries: Sagamok Development Corporation and 2344827 Ontario Inc. (Ritchie Falls Resort). COVID-19 effects disclosed as a subsequent event note. Housing expenses split between Community Housing ($1,586,215) and Housing Renovations ($452,237). Total government transfers estimated as ISC + North Shore Tribal Council + Ontario First Nations Limited Partnership + Ministry of Education + CMHC = $18,158,935. OSR includes Other revenue and share of enterprise earnings.
